summary: AI-Powered Outreach with Relationship Intelligence fully tested. Backend: 12/12 passed (1 skipped - no pending sends). Frontend: All tabs render, navigation works, relationship info visible. New Relationship Intelligence Engine provides health scores, engagement metrics, milestones.

GET /api/ai-outreach/relationship-brief/.details: Returns comprehensive brief with relationship_health, engagement_score, response_pattern, milestones, human_summary, days_since_sale, days_known, engagement_signals, previous_campaign_messages

GET /api/campaigns/{user_id}/pending-sen.details: Returns pending campaign sends list with relationship_brief field (empty string for older entries created before upgrade)

POST /api/campaigns/{user_id}/pending-se.details: Marks send as completed, returns 404 for non-existent sends

POST /api/tags/{user_id}/assign with Sol.details: Triggers both AI outreach generation AND auto-enrollment in Sold Follow-Up campaign (async tasks)

Auto-enrollment in Sold campaign.details: tags.py lines 415-489: Creates campaign if not exists, enrolls contact with trigger_type='sold_tag' and auto_enrolled=true

Relationship Intel in scheduler.details: scheduler.py lines 421-506: build_relationship_brief() called for each campaign step, human_summary stored in pending_sends

Login with timezone.details: Timezone stored on user document (verified America/New_York)

Frontend AI Outreach page.details: 4 tabs (Campaign, AI Suggestions, Accepted, Dismissed), info card, '1 active' badge, relationship-powered subtitle

Frontend Home page tile.details: AI Follow-ups tile visible in Your Day section with 'AI Follow-up: Bud' task

relationship_intel.py.notes: Comprehensive relationship brief builder. Compiles contact profile, engagement signals, conversation history, campaign messages, calculates health score (strong/warm/cooling/cold), response pattern, milestones. Both AI context (for prompts) and human summary (for salespeople).

ai_outreach.py.notes: New relationship-brief endpoint at line 116-137. Returns subset of brief for UI display.

tags.py.notes: Lines 402-489: Sold tag triggers both create_outreach_record() AND auto-enrollment in Sold Follow-Up campaign with trigger_type='sold_tag'.

scheduler.py.notes: Lines 421-506: Campaign step processing includes relationship_intel.build_relationship_brief() for rich context in pending_sends.

ai-outreach.tsx.notes: Full implementation with 4 tabs, RelBriefCard component, HealthBadge, metrics display, Copy/Mark as Sent buttons.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 passed, 1 skipped due to no test data)

test_contacts.Bud: 69a496841603573df5a41723 - has Sold tag, enrolled in campaign

context_for_next_testing_agent: Relationship Intelligence Engine is fully functional. AI outreach now uses rich context from relationship_intel.build_relationship_brief(). Sold tag triggers both AI suggestions AND auto-enrollment in campaign. Campaign tab shows pending sends with Copy/Mark as Sent buttons. Stats show 1 pending suggestion, 4 accepted, 1 dismissed. Frontend tabs all work correctly.
